## Goal

What should this help a user do?

## Proposed Change

Describe the smallest useful version.

## Target Agent

Codex, Claude Code, Cursor, another agent, or all of them?

## Safety Notes

Does this touch package installs, accounts, publishing, private files, or credentials?
